creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmmm... does this build for you?

--- lua-bozo.o ---
cc  -O2 -pipe  -DDO_HTPASSWD -I/usr/local/include/lua52 -I/usr/include -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing    -MD  -MF.depend.lua-bozo.o -MTlua-bozo.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong -Wsystem-headers -Werror -Wall -Wno-format-y2k -W -Wno-unused-parameter -Wstri
ct-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Wreturn-type -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Wswitch -Wshadow -Wunused-parameter -Wcast-align -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-pointer-sign -Wno-empty-body -Wno-string-plus-int -Wno-unused-const-variable  -Qunused-arguments  -c lua-boz
o.c -o lua-bozo.o
--- main.o ---
cc  -O2 -pipe  -DDO_HTPASSWD -I/usr/local/include/lua52 -I/usr/include -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing    -MD  -MF.depend.main.o -MTmain.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong -Wsystem-headers -Werror -Wall -Wno-format-y2k -W -Wno-unused-parameter -Wstrict-proto
types -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Wreturn-type -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Wswitch -Wshadow -Wunused-parameter -Wcast-align -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-pointer-sign -Wno-empty-body -Wno-string-plus-int -Wno-unused-const-variable  -Qunused-arguments  -c main.c -o main.
o
--- bozohttpd.8.gz ---
gzip -cn bozohttpd.8 > bozohttpd.8.gz
--- content-bozo.o ---

         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
